alert.title: Excessive Failed SSH Authentication
alert.description: 847 failed SSH login attempts detected from IP 203.0.113.42 targeting bastion host prod-bastion-01 within 15-minute window. Multiple usernames attempted: root, admin, deploy, svc-backup. No successful authentications observed yet.

context.geo_ip: Region: Eastern Europe, ISP: Unknown VPS provider
context.last_known_good: No prior alerts from this IP
